title: fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/selinux to v1.11.1
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/opencontainers/selinux](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux) | `v1.11.0` -> `v1.11.1` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fselinux/v1.11.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fselinux/v1.11.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fselinux/v1.11.0/v1.11.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2fselinux/v1.11.0/v1.11.1?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/selinux (github.com/opencontainers/selinux)</summary>

### [`v1.11.1`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/releases/tag/v1.11.1)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/compare/v1.11.0...v1.11.1)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v1.11.0 by [@​rhatdan](https://redirect.github.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/197](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/197)
-   fix some error by [@​ningmingxiao](https://redirect.github.com/ningmingxiao) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/200](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/200)
-   ci: update Go 1.21 support by [@​michalbiesek](https://redirect.github.com/michalbiesek) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/202](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/202)
-   Extend `build-cross` target with `riscv64` arch by [@​michalbiesek](https://redirect.github.com/michalbiesek) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/201](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/201)
-   Remove nolint annotations for unix errno comparisons by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/203](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/203)
-   ci: bump some actions by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/205](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/205)
-   Misc nitpicks by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/206](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/206)
-   pwalk, pwalkdir: fix walk vs remove race by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/204](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/204)
-   Update GitHub Actions CI Go matrix for Go v1.22 by [@​austinvazquez](https://redirect.github.com/austinvazquez) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/209](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/209)
-   Update GitHub Actions packages to resolve deprecation warnings. by [@​austinvazquez](https://redirect.github.com/austinvazquez) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/208](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/208)
-   Add dependabot config by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/210](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/210)
-   build(deps): bump tim-actions/get-pr-commits from 1.3.0 to 1.3.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/211](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/211)
-   build(deps): bump golangci/golangci-lint-action from 4 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/213](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/213)
-   Show SELinux label on failure by [@​rhatdan](https://redirect.github.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/216](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/216)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​ningmingxiao](https://redirect.github.com/ningmingxiao) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/200](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/200)
-   [@​michalbiesek](https://redirect.github.com/michalbiesek) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/202](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/202)
-   [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/211](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/selinux/pull/211)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/compare/v1.11.0...v1.11.1

</details>
